Universal’s cinematic take on the second half of “Wicked,” a revisionist look at “The Wizard of Oz,” has earned $76 million overseas and $147 million domestically.
Monday’s final tally was slightly behind Sunday’s estimate of $150 million domestically and $226 million globally.
“Wicked” became a global hit with $758 million, including $474 million domestically and $283 million overseas."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/12/wicked-for-good-global-box-office-milestone-1236635920/","title":"‘Wicked: For Good’ Box Office Tops $400 Million Worldwide","content":"EXCLUSIVE: Universal’s Wicked: For Good has crossed the $400M mark globally, now with more than $407M through Wednesday worldwide.
Of that, $278.1M is from domestic and $129M from the international box office.
The first weekend opened to $147M domestic and $223M around the world, besting 2024’s Wicked $112.5M domestic and $164M global start.
The Top 10 Wicked: For Good markets to date are UK ($44.5M), Australia ($14.5M), Germany ($6.8M), Korea ($5.7M), Mexico ($5.6M), Philippines ($5M), Netherlands ($3.9M), Spain ($3.6M), France ($3.5M) and Brazil ($3.4M)."},{"url":"https://www.screendaily.com/news/wicked-for-good-soars-to-223m-at-global-box-office-including-76m-international-bow/5211267.article","title":"‘Wicked: For Good’ soars to $223m at global box office including $76m international bow | News | Screen","content":"Nov 24, 2025 — Wicked: For Good dominated the global box office a confirmed $223m opening. It is in line with 2025 with $21.1m worldwide contributing to a $25 ...
‘Wicked: For Good’ soars to $223m global box office opening including $76m international bow
Its $76m international result was boosted by a confirmed $24.7m in the UK and Ireland – further details to follow in the UK-Ireland box office report.
It also soared in Australia with $8.6m, accounting for 78% of the top 10 takings and recording the biggest opening for a live-action musical, the biggest non-holiday opening of the year, Universal’s third-biggest opening of all time, and the third-biggest November opening ever.
For Good started with more than double the openings of Barbie and Lilo & Stitch in South Korea, with $3.6m.
Further territories to take more than $1m on opening weekend included Mexico, the Philippines – with a 68% market share – Brazil, Spain, Netherlands, France, Italy, and the Middle East.
Some $5.6m of the international total came from Imax – 75% up on the figure for Wicked.
The film now has an impressive $174m worldwide, led by South Korea ($24.2m), Taiwan ($7.9m), France ($3.7m), Germany ($3.7m) and the UK and Ireland ($3.6m).
Some $7.1m of this came from international territories including opening at number two in France with $2m; for totals of $48.3m worldwide and $21.3m internationally.

Wicked's expected take home is particularly impressive in a deeply depressed fall, which has seen more than its fair share of financial disasters on the big screen."},{"url":"https://www.boxofficemojo.com/year/world/","title":"2026 Worldwide Box Office","content":"2026 Worldwide Box Office ; 1, The Super Mario Galaxy Movie, $1,009,599,439 ; 2, Michael, $1,001,857,977 ; 3, Toy Story 5, $888,621,921 ; 4, The Devil Wears Prada 2 ...Read more"}]}

Among records the Cynthia Erivo-Ariana Grande starrer set in its debut frame are the biggest global and domestic opening for a movie based on a Broadway musical; the biggest opening weekend of 2025 in the UK, where it was Universal’s third-biggest launch ever; and the biggest live-action musical opening ever in Australia. **RELATED: ‘Wicked – Part One’: All The Box Office Records Broken**. ### Box Office Expand the sub-menu.","score":0.92260116,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/zacharyfolk/2025/11/23/wicked-for-good-dominates-box-office-with-150-million-opening-beating-last-years-first-installment","title":"‘Wicked: For Good’ Grosses $150 Million For Second-Biggest Opening Weekend Of 2025","content":"# ‘Wicked: For Good’ Dominates Box Office With $150 Million Opening—Beating Last Year’s First Installment. “Wicked: For Good” dominated its opening weekend and grossed an estimated $150 million at the domestic box office, according to early estimates reported by the Hollywood trade publications, turning it into the second-biggest premiere of 2025. “Wicked: For Good” is second only to “A Minecraft Movie” for 2025’s biggest opening weekend. The sequel to last year’s “Wicked” was again directed by Hollywood stalwart John Cho, and also saw the return of Ariana Grande and Cynthia Erivo in their roles as Glinda and Elphaba in an adaptation of the beloved Broadway musical. It was still not enough to unseat “A Minecraft Movie” as the most successful opening weekend of 2025—the adaptation of the massively popular video game grossed over $162 million at the domestic box office when it opened in April, eventually grossing more than $950 million worldwide. The third installment of the heist franchise won last weekend with a $21 million opening.","score":0.9183121,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.79,"request_id":"a3e6bd5c-3bc5-46ca-91ce-f7d1ca03212f"}
